calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-04-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, August 4, 2016 in Department 525:
Mouhamadou M. Diop, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with interpreter Kaveh Ashrafi. The clerk administers the interpreter's oath to Mr. Ashrafi to translate the English language into the Wolof language and vice versa.

No Appearance by Appellant/Defendant Brendan S. MacMillan.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Respondent/Plaintiff Muhamadou M. Diop is sworn.
Moushamadou M. Diop testifies on his own behalf through Wolof interpreter Kaveh Ashrafi and responds to the questions from the Court.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. No newly evidence is submitted.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.
